channel.title: Summer on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Summer on Have an average day :|

item.title: It's the simple things...
item.description: I love summer time. For so many years I was working and unable to really enjoy summer time. I did everything I could to spend weekends with the kids but it’s not the same. Getting laid off was in a lot of ways the best thing that could have happened. It’s been scary but at the same time working for myself and spending most of my time with them is better than anything I could have ever hoped for.
